---
header-includes: \usepackage{caption}
always_allow_html: yes
params:
  file_format: "html"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache=TRUE,
                      message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)

library(rlang)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
if (!exists("fileFormat")) fileFormat <- params$file_format
#Set the report year via the ReportYear global variable. 
if (!exists("ReportYear")) ReportPeriod <- MonitoringReportParams$period$description
```

---
title: "Monitoring Report Tables Section 4 `r ReportPeriod`"
---

\captionsetup[table]{labelformat=empty}

**Report Period:** `r ReportPeriod`  
**Generated:** `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`


```{r include=FALSE, echo = FALSE}

formatPercent <- function(x) {
  return(ifelse(is.na(x),"--", paste(format(round(x * 100, 2), nsmall = 2), "%")))
}

formatMaxPercent <- function(x) {
  return(ifelse(x>1,">100%",formatPercent(x)))
}

formatNumber <- function(x) {
  return(format(round(x, 0), big.mark = ",", digits= 4, nsmall = 0))
}

formatDecimal <- function(x) {
  return(format(round(x, 4), nsmall = 4))
}
```


\captionsetup[table]{labelformat=empty}


```{r echo = FALSE}
Table4_1_ReferenceLevel %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Monitoring Report Table 4.1 Reference Level", digits = 4) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )
# %>%
#  column_spec(1, color = "black",width = "30em", background = "green") %>%
#  column_spec(2, color = "black",width = "30em", background = "green")
```




```{r echo = FALSE}
Table4_2 %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Monitoring Report Table 4.2", digits = 4) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )
# %>%
#  column_spec(1, color = "black",width = "30em", background = "green") %>%
#  column_spec(2, color = "black",width = "30em", background = "green")
```



```{r echo = FALSE}
Table4_3 %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Monitoring Report Table 4.3", digits = 4) %>%
  footnote(symbol = 
  "Total Emissions Reductions column does not include Forest Degradation emissions as they are estimated with proxy data.", threeparttable = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )
```

```{r echo = FALSE}


Table4_3_t1 %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Updated Monitoring Report Table 4.3 (T1)", digits = 4) %>%
  footnote(symbol = 
  "See template", threeparttable = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  )

```

```{r echo = FALSE}


Table4_3_t2 %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Updated Monitoring Report Table 4.3 (T2)", digits = 4) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = 11,
                 latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")) %>%
  footnote(symbol = "See template", threeparttable = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = T, width = "12em") %>%
  column_spec(2, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(3, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(4, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(5, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(6, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(7, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(8, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(9, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(10, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(11, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(12, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  column_spec(13, bold = F, width = "5em") %>%
  add_header_above( c(
    " " = 1,
    "Deforestation" = 2,    # A
    "Forest degradation" = 2,    # B
    "Enhanced removals from afforestation/ reforestation (A/R)" = 2,    # C
    "Enhanced removals from other activities besides A/R*" = 2,    # D
    "Adjustments" = 2,
    "Total (tCO2-e)" = 2 # E 
  )) 

  


```

```{r echo = FALSE}


Table4_3_t5 %>%
  kable(fileFormat, caption = "Updated Monitoring Report Table 4.3 (T5)", digits = 4) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, 
                 latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"))


```
